description_long: This is a tall, slender skyscraper with a distinctive geometric facade featuring a crisscross pattern of white structural lines over blue-tinted glass panels. The building rises from a rectangular base with a grid of windows and a recessed entry area, suggesting a grand lobby. The upper portion of the structure tapers slightly and is topped with a spire, adding to its vertical emphasis. The facade is highly reflective, giving the building a sleek, modern appearance. The base is more solid and detailed, with visible entry points and architectural accents. The overall design is iconic and suggests a high-profile financial institution in a dense urban environment.
description: A tall, modern skyscraper with a blue glass facade and white diagonal structural lines, topped with a spire and set on a detailed rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, geometric facade, and the main entrance at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's slender profile and the continuation of the diagonal structural pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted geometric glass facade and the spire above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the structural grid pattern.
attribute_entrance_design: Single main entrance with multiple glass doors set into a recessed area at the base, framed by structural elements and a grid of windows.
